Class OverlayView

java.lang.Object
scorefour.view.OverlayView
All Implemented Interfaces:
Viewable
public class OverlayView extends Object implements Viewable
OverlayView initializes a non-fixed visual overlay and provides a way to draw these graphics to a Panel.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    OverlayView(int y)
    Constructs a OverlayView which stores an overlay image.

  • Constructor Details

    • OverlayView

      public OverlayView(int y)
      Constructs a OverlayView which stores an overlay image.

      To render this view, call the draw method with a Graphics object.

      This class can be accessed to view and change the y offset.

      Parameters:
      y - the y amount the overlay should be offset

  • Method Details

    • getY

      public int getY()
      Returns:
      the y amount the OverlayView object is offset.

    • setY

      public void setY(int y)
      Parameters:
      y - integer amount to offset the OverlayView

    • setCurrentPlayerColour

      public void setCurrentPlayerColour(BeadColour colour)
      Sets the bead for the turn indicator to point towards.
      Parameters:
      colour - a BeadColour

    • setScore

      public void setScore(int[] score)
      Sets the score to be displayed on the OverlayView.
      Parameters:
      score - integer array of each player's score

    • draw

      public void draw(Graphics g)
      The draw method is accessed by a Panel class to be drawn on a Frame
      Specified by:
      draw in interface Viewable
      Parameters:
      g - the Graphics context used for rendering
